headline: 106°F today — zone 1 three days dry.
weather_notes: Run zone 1 immediately — e1–e4 transplants and c-beds are 3 days dry entering 106°F today, two days past the 1-day re-water threshold for heat above 85°F.
Do all garden work before 8 AM through Tuesday — Extreme Heat Warning is active until July 14 with 103–106°F daily highs closing every outdoor window.
Hang shade cloth over e1–e4 by midday — 22-day tomato transplants risk permanent sunscald at 106°F; remove by 5 PM.
Check potato bag moisture after zone 1 runs — bags lose moisture 2–3× faster than in-ground beds at 106°F.
